title: A Global Camping Adventure
article_text: Every year, I go to an excellent camp near a big river. The edge of the forest surrounds the camp, so we feel safe. I see the annual festival there, and the audience enjoys the show. We roll the camping gear carefully into our bags. The reality of camping is a struggle because we must lift heavy equipment. I select a good guide from the group for our hike. The contrast between the quiet forest and the loud city is big. I can fully enjoy the beauty of nature here. I advertise this camp to my friends by email. The extent of my happiness grows when I look at a photograph of the trip.

sentences.en: Every year, I go to an excellent camp near a big river.
sentences.zh: 每年，我都去一个靠近大河的极好的营地。

words.eng_def: a place with tents or small houses for living outside
a large natural flow of water

sentences.en: The edge of the forest surrounds the camp, so we feel safe.
sentences.zh: 森林的边缘环绕着营地，所以我们感到安全。

words.eng_def: the part of something that is farthest from the middle

sentences.en: I see the annual festival there, and the audience enjoys the show.
sentences.zh: 我在那里看到年度庆典，观众们喜欢这场表演。

words.eng_def: the people who watch a show or event

sentences.en: We roll the camping gear carefully into our bags.
sentences.zh: 我们小心地把露营装备卷进袋子里。

words.eng_def: to move something by turning it over and over

sentences.en: The reality of camping is a struggle because we must lift heavy equipment.
sentences.zh: 露营的现实是一场挣扎，因为我们必须抬起沉重的装备。

words.eng_def: to move something up to a higher place

sentences.en: I select a good guide from the group for our hike.
sentences.zh: 我从团队中挑选一位好向导来带领我们的徒步。

words.eng_def: a person who shows the way

sentences.en: The contrast between the quiet forest and the loud city is big.
sentences.zh: 安静的森林和喧闹的城市之间的对比很大。

sentences.en: I can fully enjoy the beauty of nature here.
sentences.zh: 我可以完全享受这里自然的美景。

sentences.en: I advertise this camp to my friends by email.
sentences.zh: 我通过电子邮件向朋友们宣传这个营地。

words.eng_def: to tell people about something to make them want it

sentences.en: The extent of my happiness grows when I look at a photograph of the trip.
sentences.zh: 当我看着旅行的照片时，我的幸福程度增加了。

words.eng_def: the size or importance of something
a picture made with a camera

vocabulary.eng_def: very good
vocabulary.example: This is an excellent camp.

vocabulary.eng_def: the part of something that is farthest from the middle
vocabulary.example: The edge of the forest is dark.

vocabulary.eng_def: a place with tents or small houses for living outside
vocabulary.example: We stay at a camp near the river.

vocabulary.eng_def: the people who watch a show or event
vocabulary.example: The audience claps loudly.

vocabulary.eng_def: to move something up to a higher place
vocabulary.example: I lift the bag onto my back.

vocabulary.eng_def: a set of actions done in a certain way
vocabulary.example: The safety procedure is important.

vocabulary.eng_def: a message sent by computer
vocabulary.example: I send an email to my friend.

vocabulary.eng_def: relating to the whole world
vocabulary.example: The camp has a global audience.

vocabulary.eng_def: a difficult effort
vocabulary.example: The struggle to climb the hill is hard.

vocabulary.eng_def: to tell people about something to make them want it
vocabulary.example: They advertise the camp on TV.

vocabulary.eng_def: to choose
vocabulary.example: Please select a good tent.

vocabulary.eng_def: to be all around something
vocabulary.example: Trees surround the lake.

vocabulary.eng_def: the size or importance of something
vocabulary.example: The extent of the forest is huge.

vocabulary.eng_def: a large natural flow of water
vocabulary.example: The river flows to the sea.

vocabulary.eng_def: happening once every year
vocabulary.example: We have an annual meeting.

vocabulary.eng_def: completely
vocabulary.example: I fully agree with you.

vocabulary.eng_def: a difference between two things
vocabulary.example: The contrast in size is clear.

vocabulary.eng_def: to move something by turning it over and over
vocabulary.example: Roll the mat carefully.

vocabulary.eng_def: the true state of things
vocabulary.example: The reality is different from the dream.

vocabulary.eng_def: a picture made with a camera
vocabulary.example: I take a photograph of the sunset.

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是“极好的”？

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'the people who watch a show'?
Which word means 'a difference between two things'?
Which word means 'a picture made with a camera'?

image_prompts: A person walking toward a tent near a big river, with trees and mountains in the background.
A forest edge with tall trees surrounding a small camping area, sunlight filtering through leaves.
A stage with a small festival, people sitting as an audience watching a performance.
A person rolling a sleeping bag on the ground, with camping gear nearby.
A person struggling to lift a heavy backpack, with a tent behind them.
A group of people standing, one person pointing to a guide who is holding a map.
A split view: one side shows a quiet green forest, the other shows a busy city with cars and buildings.
A person standing in a beautiful natural landscape, arms open, looking happy.
A person typing on a laptop, with an email icon on the screen and a camp picture beside them.
A person holding a printed photograph of a camping trip, smiling while looking at it.
